productDisplayName: Catwalk Women Weaved Strap Tan Flats
description: Created for the woman of sophistication, this sandal from catwalk is crafted with high quality synthetic leather to offer unparalleled comfort and is uniquely designed to give your feet that urban touche. Upper Synthetic leather woven and braided straps with metallic embelishments running across the midfoot to the forefoot Synthetic leather heel cup with a zipper closure and an ankle clasp Fabric lined footbed with brand name Outsole TPU outsole with herringbone grooves on the forefoot and slightly elevated heel for maxium grip and comfort Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
